title: Develop a composting recipe
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a composting recipe demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and characterise raw materials

pcs.text: Identify raw materials against established workplace criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify raw materials against established workplace criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify raw materials against established workplace criteria.

pcs.text: Enter raw material characteristics into compost recipe calculator to achieve a balanced recipe
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Enter raw material characteristics into compost recipe calculator to achieve a balanced recipe?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Enter raw material characteristics into compost recipe calculator to achieve a balanced recipe.

pcs.text: Take samples of material for analysis where raw material identity or characteristics are uncertain
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take samples of material for analysis where raw material identity or characteristics are uncertain?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take samples of material for analysis where raw material identity or characteristics are uncertain.

pcs.text: Determine receivable and handling requirements of raw materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine receivable and handling requirements of raw materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine receivable and handling requirements of raw materials.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify and characterise raw materials

elements.title: Establish production objectives

pcs.text: Develop product specifications for identified markets using product performance data and enterprise records

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop product specifications for identified markets using product performance data and enterprise records.

pcs.text: Identify raw material combinations that meet market requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify raw material combinations that meet market requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify raw material combinations that meet market requirements.

elements.title: Calculate compost recipe

pcs.text: Record raw material characteristics in compost recipe

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record raw material characteristics in compost recipe.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify raw material ratios by weight in resulting compost recipe.

pcs.text: Determine raw material pre-processing requirements, volumes of compost upon formation, and compost production plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine raw material pre-processing requirements, volumes of compost upon formation, and compost production plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and document composting batch management procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate and document compost production schedule.

pcs.text: Verify compost recipe and production schedule against compost production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify compost recipe and production schedule against compost production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify compost recipe and production schedule against compost production plan.

pcs.text: Quantify density of pre-processed raw materials and translate weight-based recipe into volume-based recipe for production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Quantify density of pre-processed raw materials and translate weight-based recipe into volume-based recipe for production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Quantify density of pre-processed raw materials and translate weight-based recipe into volume-based recipe for production.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record volumetric compost recipe and production procedures as operational batch or bucket recipe and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record volumetric compost recipe and production procedures as operational batch or bucket recipe and procedures.
